channel.title: Forge
channel.description: Updates for Forge — agent-first development workbench from Coursion.

item.title: Version 0.6.1
item.description:
_2026-06-07_
- **Terminal breathing room** — Terminal panes now have left padding so output no longer hugs the pane edge. - **Accurate activity dots** — Stale "working" indicators on idle terminals now correctly demote to idle, so the sidebar and dock only signal real activity.

item.title: Version 0.6.0
item.description:
_2026-06-07_
- **Agent identities** — Every agent terminal now gets a fun random name (Maverick, Athena, Ripley, Nova…) with the engine shown small underneath — "claude code" in tabs, pane headers, the sidebar, and the command palette. Reroll any name from the pane's ··· menu, or turn naming off in Settings → Agents. - **Personas** — Assign a role to any agent: Frontend Engineer, Backend Engineer, Designer, QA, DevOps, Marketing, Docs Writer, Code Reviewer — or create your own. Claude Code gets the persona injected as a real system prompt at launch, so your Frontend Engineer actually thinks frontend. Launch a persona directly from ⌘K with "New Agent: 🎨 Frontend Engineer". - **Team templates** — One click spawns a whole squad: "Startup Squad" (Frontend + Backend + Designer) and "Ship It" (Backend + Reviewer + QA), each terminal pre-named and persona-typed. - **Smarter activity notifications** — Agents that stop to ask you something now ping differently from agents that finish: a new needs-input state with its own sound and orange tag. Native macOS banners when Forge is backgrounded (click to jump to the pane), a menu bar status item with live working/waiting/done counts, and an in-app HUD for completions in other workspaces. Pane headers show "finished 4m ago" / "waiting for input". - **Quit guard** — ⌘Q warns you when agents or terminals are still working. - **Merge worktrees in-app** — Merge agent worktree branches into your current branch from the Review pane or the command palette. - **Command palette polish** — Better keyboard navigation, section headers, smarter fuzzy matching. - **Terminal ⌘A + Delete** — Clears the agent's input line (translated to readline Ctrl+E/Ctrl+U). - **Fix** — Terminal content no longer vanishes when a second window opens.

item.title: Version 0.5.1
item.description: Fixed: Claude Code and Hermes agent chips no longer vanish from the toolbar. Agent detection now scans PATH directly with retries instead of relying on a one-shot login-shell check.

item.title: Version 0.5.0
item.description:
_2026-06-05_
- **Prompt Optimizer** — Rewrite any prompt with project-aware context before sending it to an agent. Get a side-by-side comparison plus a model and effort recommendation. Trigger from the chat input bar, the command palette, or ⌘⇧O. - **Frecency-ranked ⌘K** — The command palette now ranks board cards, workspace panes, and recent files by how often and how recently you use them. - **Searchable Add popover** — Adding a pane is a quick type-to-filter popover instead of a nested menu, with full pane names visible. - **Reliable agent chips** — Claude and Hermes toolbar chips no longer vanish after launch; agent detection now retries transient failures and caches results. - **Responsive toolbar** — The workspace top bar adapts to narrow windows with a compact mode instead of clipping buttons. - **Updater fixes** — In-app updates now wire the Sparkle delegate correctly and skip update checks when running off the launch path.

item.title: Version 0.4.1
item.description:
_2026-06-04_
- **Worktree badge** — Every terminal header and the workspace toolbar now show the active git branch and worktree at a glance, targeting the focused terminal. - **Per-terminal worktree toggle** — Enable or disable isolated worktree mode for the focused terminal straight from the toolbar. - **Reliable git detection** — Reworked git invocation to exec directly with a composed PATH and retry transient spawn failures, fixing flaky branch/worktree detection under load. - **Faster dev loop** — Reliable rebuild-and-relaunch flow with InjectionIII hot reload.

item.title: Version 0.3.0
item.description:
_2026-06-02_
- **In-app updates** — Forge now checks for, downloads, and installs new versions itself via Sparkle. Auto-check and auto-download are toggleable in Settings, with last-checked status and a one-click Check for Updates. - **What's New** — A release-notes modal driven by the bundled changelog greets you after each update, with an icon-row layout that turns each highlight into a glanceable card. - **Selectable terminal output** — Select and copy text from a terminal while a command is still streaming. - **Pane & terminal rename** — Give any pane or terminal a custom name straight from its tab. - **Workspace icon picker** — Choose from 103 SF Symbols when customizing a workspace. - **Settings refresh** — Branded toggles and segmented pickers throughout, a dedicated Coach tab, and collapsible cards to cut first-glance clutter.

item.title: Version 0.2.0
item.description: Planning board: per-workspace Trello-style kanban with AI fill, live two-way file sync, and structured sync endpoints (.forge/board.json + board.inbox.jsonl) so agents read/mutate the board without parsing markdown. Send cards straight to agent terminals. Telegram gateway + Hermes push notifications. Vendored SwiftTerm fork with Warp-style inline path completion and reliable command-completion detection. Unified solid-surface button styling.

item.title: Version 0.1.1
item.description: Editor pane, dev reload overlay, customizable top-bar chips, terminal fixes
